notes: 'bismillah' = 'in the name of God', invocation before starting an activity (eating, traveling, working). Verbatim preservation avoids the heavy literal 'in the name of God' which sounds liturgical in English. Long-form variant 'bismillahirrahmanirrahim' deferred. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: whether you and partner use 'bismillah' or just 'OK let's go' / 'here goes' for activity kick-off; this may be a religiously-marked expression that doesn't appear in everyday non-prayer contexts.
